subcodes.first_line: The epistle thou didst dispatch unto him who calleth upon his Lord in Hadbá hath been presented before the Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی الوجه کتابک الذی ارسلته الی من ینادی ربه فی الحدباء و توجه الیه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @the power of words; of speech
